channel.title: Allen Institute (AI2)
channel.description: Allen Institute (AI2) — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Which tokens does a hybrid model predict better?
item.description: New token-level analyses of Olmo 3 and Olmo Hybrid show that hybrid models predict meaning-bearing, context-dependent tokens better than transformers, while transformers retain an edge on verbatim copying.
